description: Harden the proxy.ts (Next.js middleware) admin/teacher/system guards across codecamp-advantage, science-advantage, and any other monorepo app that exposes role-gated routes. Today the guards only check cookie presence and trust the route handler downstream; this allows anyone with any valid session_token to load the admin shell, which then must defend itself. Make the proxy authoritative about role.
deviation_notes: Originating tech-debt entry (2026-05-15) named only codecamp-advantage; this track expands scope to science-advantage which has the same issue. www-reading-advantage proxy is i18n-only and does not need this work. Phase 0 (3 tasks) reduced to 1 actionable: Next.js 16 already defaults proxy to nodejs runtime; fallback endpoint design + nodejs prototype unnecessary. Phase 3 codecamp integration test deferred — codecamp has no integration test infra (tech-debt 2026-05-14), unit + auth-pkg DB tests cover contract. Phase 4 manual smoke tasks pending user execution + confirmation.
